goal: Acoustic echo cancellation via speexdsp (pyaec). Adds scripts/conduit_tui/aec.py with SpeexEchoCanceller (primary) + NumpyEchoCanceller (fallback). Orchestrator pushes decoded TTS PCM to AEC reference before play_audio (via asyncio.to_thread so mp3 decode doesn't block the event loop) and routes every mic chunk through aec.process() before sending to Deepgram. Cancels reference on barge-in so post-cut mic chunks pass through cleanly. Result: ~20 dB ERLE after convergence on synthetic round-trip test — bot's voice is suppressed at the audio layer, before Deepgram even sees it, so the self-reply loop dissolves at the source.
